title: Cape Feather Elytra
description: This is a resource pack that changes the Elytra textures into the cape feather powerup from Super Mario World
body: ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf098205d8a0499a925338137916c256ff6f1680.png)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/T6HloC47oW8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This resource pack is for Super Mario fans and aims to bring a small part of the Mario world into your Minecraft worlds. This pack replaces all of the elytra textures with the cape feather and the cape itself from Super Mario World.
